exam_name: ServiceNow Certified Implementation Specialist – Supplier Risk and Performance Management (CIS-SRM)
id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID with full name and photo. Name must match exactly as registered.
exam_rules: No notes, books, or external resources. Closed-book exam. ServiceNow platform access not provided during exam. Proctor monitors via webcam.
renewal_options: Pass a delta maintenance exam after each major ServiceNow release (approximately twice per year). Delta exams are shorter and free for certified candidates.

retake_policy.notes: 7-day waiting period after first failed attempt. Full exam fee required for retake. Certifications must be maintained via delta exams after each major release.

official_study_resources.title: ServiceNow Training & Certification Portal
official_study_resources.notes: Official NowLearning platform with free and paid courses aligned to each cert

aliases: servicenow certified implementation specialist supplier risk and performance management cis-srm
